title: DDS-Det Manager Annual Salary by Employee, 2010–2023 (CTHRU)
description: Per-employee, per-year salary and pay records for MRC manager-tier staff (bargaining group M99 and commissioner/director titles) at the Massachusetts Rehabilitation Commission, which administers DDS-Det. Source: Massachusetts CTHRU public payroll (dataset rxhc-k6iz), filtered to MRC manager-class titles, pulled 2026-05-08. ~2,543 data rows, CY2010–2023. Massachusetts public-record payroll, not confidential.

columns.name: annual_rate
columns.description: Annualized scheduled salary rate at snapshot.

columns.name: actual_paid
columns.description: Total compensation paid year-to-date at snapshot.

columns.name: snapshot_through
columns.description: Date through which pay data is captured.

notes: 2023 actual_paid is incomplete — the latest CTHRU 2023 snapshot covers only through ~2023-01-14 (~2 weeks); annual_rate is reliable for all years. Massachusetts public-record payroll data.
